fix_summary: The implementation correctly normalizes the origin search term to uppercase in `search_flights`, making origin filtering case-insensitive while leaving other filters unchanged. The regression test covers lowercase/mixed-case/uppercase origin inputs, and the automated test suite passed.
approval_reasons: The code change is localized to the flight search service as requested.
`origin.upper()` fixes the uppercase-storage mismatch without altering other search filters.
The added test demonstrates the expected case-insensitive behavior for origin matching.
Automated tests passed (6/6), indicating the change is working as intended.
